# Plan: Website Guide Page

## Objective
Add a comprehensive user-friendly guide page to the YT Shorts Alarm website.

## Phases
1. ~~Repository analysis~~ — DONE
2. Implementation — dotnet-developer creates Guide.cshtml, Guide.cshtml.cs, adds nav link
3. Verification — check for errors
4. Review — ensure content accuracy and style consistency

## Files to Create
- `Pages/Guide.cshtml` — guide content page
- `Pages/Guide.cshtml.cs` — empty PageModel

## Files to Modify
- `Pages/Shared/_Layout.cshtml` — add Guide nav link

## Content Outline
1. Getting Started (API key, channel)
2. Creating Alarms (time, days, toggle)
3. Global Playback Settings (channel, duration, volume, replays, playlist, vibration, rising volume)
4. Per-Alarm Overrides (Default checkbox pattern explained)
5. Pro vs Free
6. Permissions
7. Troubleshooting (offline fallback, reboot, lock screen)
